mapper.select:
SELECT role_id, role_name, role_key, role_sort, data_scope, menu_check_strictly, dept_check_strictly, status, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark FROM sys_role
del_flag = '0'
AND ${ew.sqlSegment}
ORDER BY role_sort
SELECT r.role_id, r.role_name, r.role_key, r.role_sort, r.data_scope, r.status FROM sys_role r INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON r.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE r.del_flag = '0' AND ur.user_id = #{userId}
